calendar.matters:
ACCOUNTING PETITION RE: Accounting #1, Fees
Off Calendar Apr-28-2026 Granted Per Written Order

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Status Hearing For Filing Of A Petition For Final Distribution Or A Petition For Approval Of Report On Status Of Administration
Off Calendar Jan-20-2026 Off Calendar

PETITION FOR LETTERS OF ADMINISTRATION WITH WILL ANNEXED
Off Calendar Jan-08-2025 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Kerry Riordan Sykes for Reid Lee Siewert, Petitioner.
Ried Lee Siewert and Michelle von Jaeger are present via Zoom.

Discussion was held regarding Petitioner's 4th Verified Supplemental Declaration filed on January 6, 2025, which cited a case from 1885 [In re: Estate of Skerrett, (1885) 67 Cal. 585]. Both counsel and the court confirmed they had "Shepardized" the case. Discussion centered on the decedent's handwritten deed and Post-It notes with instructions to record the deed, as well as oral instructions from the decedent presented as extrinsic evidence under Probate Code Section 6111(c). The court noted that no objections were filed, and no one appeared to contest the petition.

There being no objections, the court accepted that the "Grant Deed" signed and notarized on July 13, 2010, together with the decedent's handwritten instructions, were in fact a holographic will, and, as such, they are admitted to Probate. Reid Lee Siewert is appointed Administrator with Will Annexed with full IAEA authority. Bond is set at $1,498,000.00. Karen Ann Simons is appointed as the Probate Referee. A status hearing for filing of a petition for final distribution or a petition for approval of report on status of administration is set for January 20, 2026, at 9:00 a.m. in Department 204. If either petition is filed two weeks prior, no appearance is required on that date. Order for the same signed in open court.

Judge: Stephen M. Murphy; Clerk: Kenneth B. Hunt; Not reported (D204)
